page.title: Genre foundation library
page.description: Maintain the genre foundations of your works as a tree, e.g. cultivation, xuanhuan, urban, alternate history. It answers "what kind of book is this" and serves as a formal genre asset of your novel project rather than a throwaway input.
page.emptyDescription: You can manually create a root genre, or let AI generate a complete hierarchy in one go.

confirm.deleteWithDescendants: Delete genre foundation "{{name}}"? This will also remove its {{count}} sub-genres and cannot be undone.
confirm.deleteSingle: Delete genre foundation "{{name}}"? This cannot be undone.

createDialog.title: Create genre tree
createDialog.description: Pick the parent slot first, then fill in the structure manually or have AI draft one for you. This is where you curate the genre foundations of your work — the answer to "what kind of book is this".
createDialog.aiSectionHint: Best when you want to sketch the main category, sub-category and deeper levels in one pass, then fine-tune.
createDialog.aiPromptPlaceholder: e.g. I want a female-leaning urban supernatural growth arc, with the main hooks being identity reversal, faction management, and high-emotion relationships.
createDialog.parentNoneOption: No parent — create as a root genre

editDialog.title: Edit genre foundation
editDialog.description: You can change name, description and mount point. Child nodes and bound novels are preserved.
editDialog.parentNoneOption: No parent — keep as a root genre

treeEditor.rootHint: This becomes the root node created in the system.
treeEditor.childHint: Stored as a child of the parent type above.
treeEditor.descriptionPlaceholder: Describe the genre's core, payoff beats, common main arcs or reader expectations.

treeItem.deleteBlockedTitle: Unbind novels under this category or its sub-categories before deleting.
